name: sophon-research
description: Codex plugin and local CLI for AI research using Sophon's public eval, model, tool, leaderboard, and paper catalog.

interface.shortDescription: Research AI evals, models, tools, leaderboards, and papers from Sophon.
interface.longDescription: Sophon Research is a local Codex plugin and CLI for querying Sophon's public read-only AI research catalog without scraping or API keys.
defaultPrompt: Use Sophon Research to find AI eval, model, tool, leaderboard, or paper context.
